metadata.description: Browsable list of all projects with search, selection, and intent-based navigation. Use when the user wants to see, find, or select projects.

props.text: Ask the AI to create a project

children._comment: Toolbar: 48px fixed height, surfaceContainerHigh background, horizontal button row
Upload button — primary, enabled when project or folder selected
Download button — primary, enabled when file/dataset selected
Type filter — PopupMenu with icon-only items per design decisions
Search field — flex-grow text input with magnifying glass

metadata.description: Interactive directed graph viewer for a workflow. Shows steps as nodes with connections. Use when the user wants to see or navigate a workflow.
Tabular data viewer for workflow step input/output tables. Use when the user wants to inspect data produced by a workflow step.
Viewer for file content and metadata. Use when the user wants to read or preview a document or file.
Image viewer for workflow step output plots. Use when the user wants to see charts or images generated by a step.

Chronological log of user actions and system events across projects, teams, and workflows. Supports filtering by event type, column values, and date ranges. Use when the user wants to review recent activity, audit history, or investigate system events.
Team member management. View, add, and remove team members. Use when the user wants to manage team membership.
LLM chat interface. Displays message thread with markdown, code blocks, and streaming. Use when the user needs a chat window.

props.text: Ask a question or give an instruction

metadata.description: Landing dashboard with recent projects, featured apps, help links, and recent activity in a card grid. Shown on startup.
Top-level header bar with brand logo, user avatar, and dropdown menu. Frame chrome — not user-requested.
Live task monitor showing running and completed tasks with progress, elapsed time, and cancel button. Use when the user wants to see running tasks.
